title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates family as a Teacher in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates:
Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates!
